prompt: Use the Librarian to investigate how Vercel's AI SDK handles streaming responses — specifically how `streamText` works end-to-end. I want to understand the architecture from the public API down to the actual streaming implementation. Compare it with how LangChain.js does streaming if you can.

assertions.text: Contains GitHub source links to vercel/ai repo files
Traces streamText from public API to internal streaming implementation
Includes a mermaid diagram of the streaming architecture or flow
Includes comparison with LangChain.js streaming approach
